# Incubation Log: <bot name>

**Incubation size:** $<amount>, <N>x leverage
**Pre-written scale/kill rule (fill in BEFORE going live, do not edit after seeing results):**
- Duration: run for <N> days/weeks before deciding
- "Doing well" means: <specific numeric bar, e.g. positive P&L with no unresolved bugs, or Sharpe > X over the incubation window>
- If it doesn't clear that bar by the deadline: kill it, no extensions.

## Pre-flight checklist (must all be checked before first real order)
- [ ] Dry run completed with zero real orders placed, plumbing confirmed
- [ ] Stop-loss and take-profit set
- [ ] Kill switch threshold set: <N>%
- [ ] Position-check-before-entry confirmed in code
- [ ] Cancel-stale-orders-before-new-order confirmed in code
- [ ] Isolated sub-account/wallet used
